CREATE TABLE test_array (id Int32, values Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) FROM test_array WHERE arrayShuffle(values)[1] > 5;
SELECT arrayShuffle(arrayJoin(values)) FROM test_array WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_array WHERE id > 1);
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values, 42) AS shuffled_values FROM test_array;
CREATE TABLE test_result (id Int32, shuffled_values Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_result SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) FROM test_array;
SELECT id, shuffled_values FROM test_result WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_array ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
SELECT arrayShuffle(arrayConcat((SELECT values FROM test_array WHERE id = 1), (SELECT values FROM test_array WHERE id = 2)));
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(arrayMap(x -> x * 2, values)) AS doubled_shuffled FROM test_array;
CREATE TABLE array_seed_test (id Int32, values Array(Int32), seed UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values, seed) FROM array_seed_test;
SELECT id, arrayShuffle(values) AS random_shuffle, arrayShuffle(values, seed) AS seeded_shuffle FROM array_seed_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayShuffle(values) FROM (SELECT values FROM test_array WHERE id < 3) AS sub;
SELECT arrayShuffle(arrayJoin((SELECT values FROM test_array WHERE id > 1))) AS deep_shuffled FROM test_array;
